query_title: John Mulaney & The Sack Lunch Bunch

recommendations.title: Totò Sapore and the Magical Story of Pizza
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Family, Adventure, Music, Romance
recommendations.overview: Naples, 18th century. Salvatore "Totò" Sapore, an unemployed minstrel, always manages to cheer up the hungry with his songs about good food, always upsetting Vesuvia, a magma witch who lives inside the Vesuvius.

recommendations.title: John Mulaney: Kid Gorgeous at Radio City
recommendations.overview: John Mulaney relays stories from his childhood and "SNL," eviscerates the value of college and laments getting older in this electric comedy special.

recommendations.title: SLC Punk
recommendations.overview: Two former geeks become 1980s punks, then party and go to concerts while deciding what to do with their lives.

recommendations.title: Fierce
recommendations.overview: Talent and passion for music can take one to the very top. On the way, however, there are going to be showbiz traps.

recommendations.title: Danny Collins
recommendations.overview: An ageing hard-living 1970s rock star decides to change his life when he discovers a 40-year-old undelivered letter written to him by John Lennon.

recommendations.title: A Star Is Born
recommendations.overview: Drunken, has-been rock star John Norman Howard falls in love with unknown singer Esther Hoffman after seeing her perform at a club. He lets her sing a few songs at one of his shows and she becomes the talk of the music industry. Esther's star begins

recommendations.title: My Little Pony: Equestria Girls – Rainbow Rocks
recommendations.overview: Music rules and rainbows rock as Twilight Sparkle and pals compete for the top spot in the Canterlot High "Mane Event" talent show. The girls must rock their way to the top, and outshine rival Adagio Dazzle and her band The Dazzlings, to restore harm

recommendations.title: Bandslam
recommendations.overview: A  new kid in town assembles a fledgling rock band — together, they achieve their dreams and compete against the best in the biggest event of the year, a battle of the bands.

recommendations.title: AC/DC: Live At Donington
recommendations.overview: In August of 1991, AC/DC headlined their third "Monsters Of Rock" festival at Castle Donington. One for the ages, the two hour set is loaded with classics and awesome visuals including firing cannons, the hells bell and a giant inflatable Rosie.

recommendations.title: Band Aid
recommendations.overview: A couple who can't stop fighting embark on a last-ditch effort to save their marriage: turning their fights into songs and starting a band.
